summary: Iteration 23: All tests PASSED. Staff Export (PDF/Excel) and Daily Report Staff Attendance integration verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All export buttons present and functional, Daily Report shows Staff Attendance section with P/H/CH/A cards and staff name table.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested Staff Export and Daily Report integration. All export endpoints work correctly: /api/staff/export/attendance (PDF/Excel), /api/staff/export/payments (PDF/Excel). Daily Report JSON includes staff_attendance object. Daily Report PDF (Section 10) and Excel (Section 8) include Staff Attendance. Frontend shows export buttons (data-testid: att-export-excel, att-export-pdf, pay-export-excel, pay-export-pdf) and Daily Report displays Staff Attendance / हाज़िरी section with P/H/CH/A badges.
